name: Grandma Ruby's Peachy Floating Island
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the milk.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the egg yolks, whole egg, salt, and sugar together until combined.
3. Gradually add the scalded milk to the egg mixture while stirring constantly to prevent curdling.
4. Remove the bowl from heat and stir in the vanilla.
5. Allow the custard to cool slightly before adding the diced peaches and stirring gently to combine.
6. When cooled, fold in the peaches until just incorporated.
7. Place the custard in serving dishes.
8. Prepare a stiff meringue using two egg whites and four tablespoons beet or cane sugar.
9. Drop spoonfuls of the meringue on top of the custard.
10. Garnish with a small amount of peach jam.
Serves 4
